caption: A man wearing a dark green baseball cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt sits in a room decorated with numerous framed photos on the wall. His t-shirt features the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" in white and red letters. A professional black microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. In the background, a white mannequin torso and a clothing rack are visible. The scene is branded with a red and white logo that says "RED VELVET PODCAST" and a circular logo that says "THE RED VELVET PODCAST." Across the sequence, the man maintains a skeptical or contemplative expression, shifting his gaze slightly and subtly changing his facial muscles, while his overall position and the surrounding environment remain stationary.
